description: Create the complete index.html file for MSP (Manulife Saving Protector) product page. Must follow the exact same CSS/layout pattern as index (17).html but with MSP-specific content. Self-contained single HTML file with inline CSS and JS.
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/Project-msp/index.html with the same CSS styling as the template (green Manulife theme, card-based layout, responsive design, sticky tabs, WA banner, floating WA button)

WA Banner: Fixed sticky header with text 'Petrus Jakub Partner Bisnis Manulife', WA logo SVG, phone 087781896087, clickable link to https://wa.me/6287781896087?text=Pak%20Petrus%2C%20saya%20mau%20tanya%20soal%20Asuransi%20MSP
Header section: Title 'Manulife Saving Protector (MSP)' with subtitle describing it as asuransi dwiguna (tabungan + proteksi)
Tab navigation with 6 tabs: Ringkasan Produk, Manfaat, Kalkulator, Ilustrasi, Ketentuan, FAQ

Tab 1 (Ringkasan): Explain MSP in simple language - savings+protection, 5-year payment only, 10/15/20 year terms, guaranteed issuance, IDR/USD currencies, entry age 1mo-80yrs, target audience (education/retirement/inheritance)

Tab 2 (Manfaat): Three main benefits explained simply - (1) Annual Cash Payment starting year 5 (15%/17.5%/20% of annual premium), (2) End of Coverage Benefit (500% of annual premium), (3) Death Benefit with graduation table. Include comparison table showing total benefits vs total premiums for all terms.

Tab 3 (Kalkulator - MOST IMPORTANT): Full premium calculator with: Currency selector (IDR/USD), Term selector (10/15/20), Annual Premium input (with min validation: IDR 12jt, USD 2000), Payment Mode selector (Tahunan/Semesteran/Kuartalan/Bulanan). Display results: modal faktor conversion, total premium paid, annual cash benefit amount, total annual cash benefits, end benefit (500%), total all benefits, ratio vs premiums. Include year-by-year breakdown table showing Year, Premium Paid that year, Annual Cash Benefit, Cumulative Benefits. Calculator formulas: IDR rates 15%/17.5%/20%, USD rates 5%/8%/11%, End Benefit always 500%. For non-annual modes use modal faktor: Semesteran 0.525/0.5125, Kuartalan 0.275/0.265, Bulanan 0.095/0.09

Tab 4 (Ilustrasi): Show 3 pre-calculated example scenarios - Term 10/15/20 with Rp100jt annual premium, showing year-by-year table of premium payments, annual cash benefits, and cumulative totals. Also show death benefit scenarios.

Tab 5 (Ketentuan): Policy terms, exclusions (suicide 2yr, war, nuclear, criminal, alcohol/drugs), accident exclusions, claim process (60 days to submit, 30 days to process), reinstatement (2 years), policy loan, APL, surrender

Tab 6 (FAQ): At least 8-10 FAQ items covering common questions about MSP - what is it, how is it different from unit link, minimum premium, what happens if I miss payment, can I withdraw early, is it guaranteed, what if insured dies, how to claim
JavaScript: Tab switching, FAQ accordion, Calculator with real-time calculation and validation, number formatting (Indonesian locale for IDR, standard for USD)
All content in Bahasa Indonesia, using simple language (bahasa awam). Floating WA button at bottom-right matching template pattern.
acceptance_criteria: File /projects/sandbox/Project-msp/index.html exists and is valid HTML5
All 6 tabs display correctly when clicked
Calculator correctly computes benefits for all combinations of currency, term, and payment mode
Calculator validates minimum premium (IDR 12,000,000 / USD 2,000 annual equivalent)
Calculator year-by-year table shows correct values (premium years 1-5, cash benefits starting year 5 end, end benefit at maturity)
WA sticky header links to correct WhatsApp URL with MSP text
All CSS is inline (no external stylesheets or CDN)
Responsive design works on mobile (tested via CSS media queries)
All content is about MSP product (not MiUHC)
Calculator modal faktor correctly converts non-annual premiums to annual equivalent
verification: Run: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('/projects/sandbox/Project-msp/index.html','utf8'); console.log('File size:', html.length, 'bytes'); console.log('Has MSP:', html.includes('Manulife Saving Protector')); console.log('Has Calculator:', html.includes('Kalkulator')); console.log('Has WA link:', html.includes('wa.me/6287781896087')); console.log('Has tabs:', html.includes('tab-ringkasan')); console.log('No external CSS:', !html.includes('link rel=\"stylesheet\"')); console.log('Has modal faktor:', html.includes('0.525')); console.log('Has 500%:', html.includes('500%'));"
Validate HTML structure is well-formed by checking matching tags
Verify calculator JavaScript contains correct rate constants (0.15, 0.175, 0.20 for IDR and 0.05, 0.08, 0.11 for USD)
findings: File created successfully at 34506 bytes. All 6 tabs present and working. Calculator logic verified mathematically correct for all term/currency/mode combinations. HTML structure validates properly. Node.js has a proxy bootstrap issue in this sandbox but Python3 works fine for verification.
